sprint.goal: KE-9: Browser governance + irreversible action detection + P1 telemetry bug (#1384, #1385, #1477)
sprint.priorSprint: KE-9 sec-maint COMPLETE: #1449 closed (PR #1469 merged 2026-03-30T09:40Z by jpleva91)

senior.title: bug(telemetry): default fallback URL 'telemetry.agentguard.dev' unreachable — events silently dropped
senior.note: P1 bug. Silent data loss for all new users without AGENTGUARD_TELEMETRY_URL in .env. Fix: update default URL in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts to https://agentguard-cloud-api-server.vercel.app. Small scope, high impact. Filed 2026-03-30 by telemetry E2E gate agent.

secondary.title: feat: browser governance invariants — scope, state, and pacing for browser agents
secondary.note: 3+ EM cycles in design phase with no implementation or PR filed. Open design questions: browser.* action class vs shell.exec extension, URL scope matching strategy, pacing correction feedback. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema exists for #1385 overlap. Needs implementation start this cycle.

tertiary.title: feat: irreversible action detection — human confirmation gates for one-way operations
tertiary.note: 3+ EM cycles in design phase. PauseRequested/PauseResolved schema exists in packages/events/src/schema.ts. Hook point in packages/kernel/src/decision.ts. Blast radius foundation available. Needs implementation start.

blockers.title: [dogfood] no-governance-self-modification blocks EM squad state writes to .agentguard/squads/
blockers.note: Escalated at run 2 (2026-03-31T07:37Z). Still unresolved as of 2026-04-05. Fix: narrow OPERATIONAL_STATE_PATTERNS in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts to exclude .agentguard/squads/**. Same fix class as #1427 (persona.env exemption, PR #1436).

healthReason: KE-9 sprint features (#1384, #1385) stalled in design for 3+ cycles with no implementation PRs. P1 bug #1477 (telemetry URL silent failure) unaddressed since 2026-03-30. Blocker #1473 persists (ageRuns=3, director-escalated). Tests stable at 4693/4693. 0 open PRs.

testHealth.note: Stable baseline from QA run 2026-03-30T18:52Z. No kernel/invariant changes since.

mergedThisCycle.title: fix(deps): patch path-to-regexp and brace-expansion Dependabot alerts (#1449)
mergedThisCycle.note: KE-9 security maintenance. pnpm.overrides for path-to-regexp >=8.4.0 and brace-expansion >=5.0.5. pnpm audit clean. Merged 2026-03-30T09:40Z by jpleva91. Closes #1449.
